parameters.content:
## Meeting Talk-Time Analyzer — Fireflies + Telegram

For managers, coaches, and team leads who want to know exactly how much each person spoke in a meeting — and whether anyone dominated. When Fireflies finishes transcribing a meeting, this workflow fetches the built-in speaker analytics, builds a visual ASCII bar chart per speaker, detects if anyone crossed the dominance threshold, and sends a complete formatted report to Telegram instantly. No AI, no spreadsheets — just pure meeting analytics delivered to your phone.

## How it works
- **1. Webhook — Fireflies Transcript Done** receives the meetingId from Fireflies on transcription complete
- **2. Set — Config Values** stores your Fireflies API key, Telegram chat ID, and the dominance threshold percentage (default 70)
- **3. HTTP — Fetch Speaker Analytics** calls the Fireflies GraphQL API and returns per-speaker data: talk time percentage, word count, pace, questions asked, longest monologue, speaking turns, and filler words
- **4. Code — Analyze Speaker Data** sorts speakers by talk time, builds a visual bar chart for each (10 blocks = 100%), detects if anyone crossed the threshold, calculates total questions, and builds the complete Telegram message
- **5. Telegram — Send Talk-Time Report** delivers the formatted report with speaker breakdown and dominance alert to your Telegram chat

## Set up steps
1. Activate the workflow and copy the webhook URL from node 1
2. In Fireflies — go to Settings, Developer Settings, Webhooks, and paste the URL
3. In **2. Set — Config Values** — replace YOUR_FIREFLIES_API_KEY and YOUR_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID
4. In **5. Telegram — Send Talk-Time Report** — connect your Telegram Bot API credential and send /start to your bot before testing
5. Optionally adjust dominanceThreshold in node 2 — lower for stricter flagging, higher for looser

## Webhook Receipt and Config
Fireflies POSTs a meetingId here on transcription complete. Config stores your Fireflies API key, Telegram chat ID, and the dominance threshold. The meetingId is extracted inline from the webhook payload.

nodes.name: Section — Speaker Analytics Fetch and Analysis

parameters.content:
## Speaker Analytics Fetch and Analysis
Fetches Fireflies per-speaker analytics: talk time percentage, word count, pace, questions, longest monologue, turns, and filler words. Builds ASCII bar charts, detects dominance, and assembles the full Telegram report.

## Telegram Delivery
Sends the formatted talk-time report with visual bar chart and dominance alert to your Telegram chat instantly.
